title: Opinion: Opinion | America Has Never, Ever Looked This Humiliated: The Story Of A Superpower's Fall
summary_full: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.
summary_public: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.
